'''[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] Crollick''' was the senior [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] representative on [[N'zoth]] in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], at the time of the Imperial evacuation in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], eight months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Biography==
Although Crollick had ultimate authority over the military presence at N'zoth, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Jian Paret]] was the ranking officer of the military force when the evacuation was ordered, and it was Commander Paret who transferred to the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']] to supervise the pullout.

However, as the evacuation was underway, Yevethan insurgents led by [[Nil Spaar]] seized ''Intimidator'', and as Crollick's shuttle was leading a flotilla of transports from the surface into her hangar bays, the Yevetha turned the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer's]] guns on them, wiping out all 20,000 Imperial personnel of the garrison and civilian administration based on N'zoth.
